label: Foundations
description: Minimal files every repo gets. Process add-ons stay opt-in.

label: Documentation
description: Optional docs scaffolding (ARCHITECTURE, CONTRIBUTING, ADRs, CHANGELOG).

label: GitHub remote
description: Optional GitHub remote setup, labels, and branch protection.

label: Agent workflow
description: Optional agent process automation for repos that need multi-agent or strict closeout workflows.

label: PR contract bundle
description: Optional PR title/body/branch workflows for repos that want enforced merge ceremony.

label: Language CI
description: Optional runner-backed CI callers. Standard onboarding installs no required GitHub Actions gate.

label: Copilot / Pro tier (v0.4)
description: Copilot enablement and Actions secrets. Hidden until v0.4.
